titles.title: You have been good to me

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: When I stop and think of all He's done I must confess He is good And when I look at where He's brought me from I must confess He is good

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: When I see all His love for me I can't keep silent, I've got to sing Lord from the depths of my soul I proclaim That You have been good to me

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: You have been good to me Over and over Your mercies I see So good to me, forever faithful You have been good to me

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: And when I think of healing That He gives I must confess He is good And when I look at all That He forgives I must confess He is good

verse.name: V5
verse.lines: When I remember How He saved my soul Brought light to my dark Made me every bit whole I just can't help But to tell the whole world My God You've been good to me

verse.name: V6
verse.lines: You have been good to me Over and over Your mercies I see So good to me Forever faithful You have been good to me

verse.name: V7
verse.lines: You have been good to me (Ohhh) You have been good to me So good You have been good to me You have been good to me (Ohhh) You have been good to me So good You have been good Oh, You have been good to me

verse.name: V8
verse.lines: You have been good to me Over and over your mercies I see So good to me Forever faithful You have been good to me

verse.name: V9
verse.lines: So good You have been good You have been good to me (Ohh) You have been good to me
